data.html:
Algorithm 1 Non-monotonically Triggered ASGD(NTASGD)
Inputs：Initial point wo，learning rate γ，logging interval L，non-monotone interval n.
1：Initialize k←0，t←0，T←0，logs←[]
2：while stopping criterion not met do
3：Compute stochastic gradient Vf(w) and take SGD step (1).
4：if mod(k，L)=0 and T=0 then
5：Compute validation perplexity v.
6：if t>n and v>minlogs[1] then
7：Set T←k
8：end if
9：Append v to logs
10：t←t+1
11：end if
12：end while
return ∑ki=Twi
(k-T+1)

data.footnote:
The text content from the image is as follows:

"Table 1. Single model perplexity on validation and test sets for the Penn Treebank language modeling task. Parameter numbers with † are estimates based upon our understanding of the model and with reference to Merity et al. (2016). Models noting tied use weight tying on the embedding and softmax weights. Our model, AWD-LSTM, stands for ASGD Weight-Dropped LSTM." The text content from the image is as follows:
